title: Roman Chicken
ingredients: 1½ teaspoons freshly ground black pepper, divided
¼ cup chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley
instructions: Season chicken with half the salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Brown chicken on both sides; remove and set aside.
In same pan, cook peppers and prosciutto until peppers soften and prosciutto is crisp.
Add tomatoes, wine, herbs, and stock, scraping up browned bits.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer until cooked through.
Stir in capers and parsley just before serving.
notes: Serve with pasta, mashed potatoes or polenta.
